requirement: named duplicate compiler/runtime abstractions must be consolidated without old-path reexport stubs

scans.command: rg -n "struct DispatchConfig|enum Target|struct WorkItem|enum WorkItem|struct BackendCapabilities|struct BufferPool|struct ReadbackRing" vyre-aot/src vyre-driver/src vyre-driver-wgpu/src vyre-runtime/src vyre-foundation/src

rg -n "trait CpuOp|enum CategoryAOp|type CpuFn|enum Semiring|enum DeterminismClass|enum AccessKind|struct BindResultEntry" vyre-foundation/src vyre-reference/src vyre-self-substrate/src vyre-primitives/src vyre-spec/src vyre-bench/src vyre-lower/src vyre-emit-naga/src
find ... excluding target/.cargo-target for scratch/deprecated/compat/old paths
scans.interpretation: No dead scratch.rs or old compatibility module was found in the scanned consolidation set; remaining matches are active optimizer/test names.

status: current scan shows named duplications consolidated
caveat: This is a targeted scan for user-surfaced duplicate symbols, not a whole-workspace semantic clone detector.
